use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and interactive elements
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Secondary and ghost button styles for less prominent actions
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant and size options. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with standard focus states and disabled behavior. Clean, flat design suitable for any application.
